description: Style Note You can see the smooth blend of style and comfort in this remanika creation. This printed top can be worn to beat the heat in style with a pair of shorts and flip flops. Product Details Green printed top, has spaghetti straps which converge at the centre at the back neckline, elastication at the back neckline, smocking around the waist and a lace detail at the hemline Material and Care Cotton Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and tumble dry low Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
